title: Dash's Tweaks
description: Small, vanilla-friendly tweaks: Happy Ghast shielding, Echo Shard duplication, and more!
body:
# Dash’s Tweaks

Small, non-intrusive tweaks for Vanilla Minecraft. **No new items or blocks.**

## Features

1. Happy Ghast shielding  
   While riding a Happy Ghast, blocking with a shield protects the ghast from incoming projectiles. The shield loses durability.

2. Echo shard duplication  
   If a mob dies near a sculk catalyst while an echo shard and an amethyst shard are on the ground, there’s a **10%** chance the amethyst converts into an echo shard (otherwise **90%** chance it shatters).

3. Bedrock cracking  
   Detonating TNT on top of bedrock inside a weakness lingering potion cloud cracks the bedrock into deepslate.
4. Beacon Expansion
  Beacon effects now apply to all non-undead mobs in the range.

5. More to come  
   Additional vanilla-friendly tweaks planned for future updates.
